case_title: ALLIED TRADES CREDIT UNION VS BANDRIDGE BOBBIE JEAN

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BANDRIDGE BOBBIE JEAN
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BANDRIDGE BOBBIE JEAN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALLIED TRADES CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BANDRIDGE BOBBIE JEAN $630.19 PRINCIPAL, $37.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $667.19 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $475.05 AS TO DEFENDANT BANDRIDGE BOBBIE JEAN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $680.19 FILED BY ALLIED TRADES CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT BANDRIDGE BOBBIE JEAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-03-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 04
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $50.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $16.68 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT BANDRIDGE BOBBIE JEAN
